versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   haproxy-ingress-1-49-0          true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: haproxy
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: haproxy-ingress-1-49-0
      name: haproxy-ingress
      namespace: haproxy
      values: |
        kubernetes-ingress:
          controller:
            replicaCount: 1
